headlines.headline: NBA championship and Finals MVP odds: Lakers' odds continue to lengthen heading into Game 2
headlines.description: The Lakers are now 45-1 to win the NBA championship following their Game 1 loss to the Thunder.

headlines.headline: Stephen A. has some words for Jaylen Brown
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith questions Jaylen Brown calling this season his favorite despite blowing a 3-1 series lead to the 76ers.

headlines.headline: Perkins: You can't win a championship with Embiid as a franchise face
headlines.description: Kendrick Perkins says on "First Take" that the 76ers cannot win a championship with Joel Embiid as one of the faces of the franchise because of his injury history.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: The Knicks need OG Anunoby to reach the Finals
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith explains why OG Anunoby's injury is a bigger headline than the Knicks' win in Game 2 vs. the 76ers.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Conference semifinals takeaways
headlines.description: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next -- for the 76ers-Knicks, Cavs-Pistons, Wolves-Spurs and Lakers-Thunder series.

headlines.headline: Why Hahn would keep Brown over Tatum if it came down to it for Celtics
headlines.description: Alan Hahn says he'd keep Jaylen Brown over Jayson Tatum if the Celtics had to choose between the two.

headlines.headline: Why Rich Eisen believes Steelers will be better in 2026
headlines.description: Rich Eisen shares why the Steelers might improve in 2026 with Aaron Rodgers likely back in the fold.

headlines.headline: Sources: Rodgers to visit Steelers, likely to play for team in '26
headlines.description: Quarterback Aaron Rodgers is expected to visit the Steelers this weekend and is likely to play for them this season, sources told NFL Network's Ian Rapoport on Thursday.

headlines.headline: Biggest roster holes for all 32 NFL teams following the draft
headlines.description: Even after free agency, trades and the draft, NFL teams still have at least one position that needs a boost. Here's one for every roster.

headlines.headline: Johnny Manziel-Bob Menery boxing fight set for UFC Apex
headlines.description: Johnny Manziel will try his hand at the sweet science when he steps into a boxing ring May 23 at the UFC Apex in Las Vegas to face social media influencer Bob Menery.

headlines.headline: Justin Herbert seemingly makes cameo in Madison Beer music video tease
headlines.description: The Grammy-nominated artist will release a new music video Friday that could feature the Chargers quarterback.

headlines.headline: Patriots QB Maye backs Vrabel, not worried about distraction
headlines.description: Patriots quarterback Drake Maye stood behind his coach and said he doesn't believe Mike Vrabel's off-field issues will be a distraction this season.

headlines.headline: Defensemen Makar, Dahlin, Werenski finalists for Norris Trophy
headlines.description: Colorado's Cale Makar, Buffalo's Rasmus Dahlin and Columbus blueliner Zach Werenski are all finalists for the Norris Trophy, awarded each year to the NHL's top defenseman.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: The series against the Canes shifts to Philly. Plus, highlights and key plays from Wednesday's games.
